diagrams.title: ARM Cortex-M Vector Table Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the layout of vector table starting at address 0x00000000 with initial SP, followed by exception handlers and IRQ handlers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding exception and interrupt handling flow in Cortex-M

diagrams.title: ARM Firmware Development Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the complete firmware development process from source code to execution
diagrams.purpose: Understanding firmware build and deployment process

diagrams.title: Bootloader vs Application Memory Map
diagrams.description: Shows how memory is organized when bootloader and application coexist
diagrams.purpose: Understanding firmware memory organization and boot process

diagrams.title: ARM Cortex-M Exception Priority Model
diagrams.description: Shows the priority hierarchy of exceptions and interrupts in Cortex-M
diagrams.purpose: Understanding interrupt prioritization and nested behavior
